transcript.text:
*Large-Size Beef Intestine Spicy Rice Cake
*I need extra toppings
Toppings itself is 12 servings
*And the fried rice makes it 18 servings
I saw some dessert from the menu
I'll order some dessert
Hello everyone~
I am here today to eat some beef small intestines spicy rice cake
I am a small intestine fanatic
So let's go and eat some
Since they specialize in small intestines
4 Large-size intestine spicy rice cake
Let's add fishcake soup
Corn dog
Add extra toppings
Small intestines, large intestines, abomasum

Let's do 1 of each
1 fried seaweed roll too
Beverages as well
*Finished
What's this?
The place feels more like a cafe than a beef intestine restaurant
The visuals They have a whole intestine in here
Their rice cake looks like this
Very cool
This isn't beef abomasum, they use pork abomasum
The small intestine and large intestine are beef
As soon as you take that first bite
You can taste the fire
And it's very different from your average spicy rice cake
They said that the small intestine is ready to eat
Let's cut it up

That looks delicious
You know how if the intestines are in a broth or anything, the fillings are out
But it's not for this one
I think it's because it's in here as a whole
The rice cake looks unique
I haven't seen anything like it
Hot
The sauce is well soaked into the rice cake
Large intestines this time
The intestines are so good
Abomasum this time
It's pork
It's not rough at all it's tender and chewy
Their abomasum tastes great
Everything tastes good because their sauce/broth is so good
I honestly didn't expect it to be this good

Green grape and passion fruits ade
The passion fruits has seeds in it
Yummy
This tastes good too
And also
They cook the intestine beforehand, so the dish itself tastes less greasy
I'm not really good at eating large intestines because of their greasiness
But this one is very clean
Fishcake soup Thank you
What's this? That's very cool
Some fishcake balls look like chestnuts
Since it will be too hot if I eat it as a whole
That looks good
What is this? Flying fish roe? Egg yolk? Let's try it
Flying fish roe
The fishcake is really unique as well

It doesn't taste like fishcake It's really delicious
Something exploded
Is it cheese?
It's overflowing with cheese
It's still very hot though I need to be careful
This is..
This is tasty It's like corn cheese
Like a corn soup
These are your additional toppings
I ordered these toppings in the beginning There's a lot
Yum!
It's a brand new order now
Bon appetit!
It's like I'm starting the mukbang all over
The intestines are
Very clean-tasting and savory I think because it goes inside this broth

And it's delicious
It's also filled with its fillings
Usually, everything comes out but they put it in as a whole so it doesn't
I have to eat it quickly before the fillings fall apart
Thank you
*Corn Dog and Fried Seaweed Roll
It's my favorite kind of corn dog I love these
Let's dip it in
They just made it
Yummy
It's good because it's freshly cooked
Small intestine mountain
I think I'm going to need additional toppings
So I'll go order some more
More small intestines Large intestines too
2 servings of abomasum

That looks scrumptious
I keep eating because it's not greasy
So good
I've been craving to eat pork abomasum
Abomasum train
I knew it
It's completely filled
It keeps getting better and better
How so?
It's nothing like the intestine stew
The fire taste is very strong
You can taste both the spicy rice cake and the intestine stew
You can't just come up with one dish to describe this
But it's very delicious
I need more toppings
The small intestines taste so good

She ate 12 servings of toppings alone
The regular dishes she had are about 4 servings
She's really good at eating
I feel like it keeps becoming a new dish
Rice cake
Put small intestines in there
Put large intestines and abomasum
This is how you eat it
Wrap the fishcake with abomasum
So good
Now for the finale: fried rice
Let's eat the fried rice
I'll go order
Looks yummy!
They put so much corn and cheese for me
It's melting

Wrap it
Oh that's good
Let's mix it all up
This is just like the cheese rice
Or like natto
It's too hot
It tastes 2 times better after mixing it
I think 1 order of fried rice will be enough for 2 people
Oh right, before I finish eating
I saw some dessert on the menu
So I'll go order some dessert
Last bite
Their fried rice is a must
This is a very small pineapple
That looks good
The refreshing taste that I imagined

The dessert tastes so good
The cap is so cute
It was my first time trying the intestine rice cake
It was an unimaginable combination of food
But they went so well It was something I never had before
But it was delicious
